author.name: Frederick Bennett
author.affiliation: Department of Environment, Science and Innovation, Queensland Government

description: Global sensitivity analysis with RS-HDMR — Sobol indices, Shapley effects (including correlated inputs via Monte Carlo), Owen-Shapley interactions, and moment-free measures (PAWN, Delta, H-index).
keywords: sensitivity analysis, Shapley effects, Sobol indices, Python, uncertainty quantification, HDMR, correlated inputs, variance-based, PAWN, Monte Carlo, surrogate modelling
title: ShapleyX
